internal.content:
---
title: Cúram by Merative™ 
description: Overview
---

<InlineNotification>
   Merative™ Social Program Management is now Cúram by Merative™ - Look for upcoming releases under this new name.

</InlineNotification>

As of 23rd July 2026 all releases will have product documentation on S-Drive. In addition, documentation for 8.2.2.0 (3rd July 2026) and Curam Action View 1.0.0 (25th June 2026) will also be available on S-Drive.

You can open a support case at the [Merative Support](https://merative.my.site.com/mysupport/s/).

---
title: Cúram by Merative™ 
description: Overview
---

<InlineNotification>
   Merative™ Social Program Management is now Cúram by Merative™ - Look for upcoming releases under this new name.

</InlineNotification>

As of 23rd July 2026 all releases will have product documentation on S-Drive. In addition, documentation for 8.2.2.0 (3rd July 2026) and Curam Action View 1.0.0 (25th June 2026) will also be available on S-Drive.

You can open a support case at the [Merative Support](https://merative.my.site.com/mysupport/s/).
